name: GTE
description: Analog pulse extractor and Channel Index translator for N.U.S.S. or any Eurorack system. Derives channel gates, pulse streams and odd/even activity from motion at Span.

controls.name: Span
controls.description: Selects which channel region the input voltage is currently addressing.

controls.name: Span Attenuverter
controls.description: Sets span sensitivity and polarity. Fully clockwise is the reference for Channel Index translation.
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: off · CW: normal

controls.name: Space
controls.description: Sets the voltage distance required to traverse the channel set.
controls.detail: lower = denser activity · higher = wider spacing

inputs.name: Span CV In
inputs.description: Control voltage that drives channel selection and gate extraction.

inputs.name: Space CV In
inputs.description: CV over the channel spacing threshold.

inputs.name: Trigger In
inputs.description: Synchronizes channel changes to a trigger or gate edge.

outputs.name: Channel Out 1-8
outputs.description: Eight gate outputs that represent the currently selected channel.

outputs.name: GTE Pulse Stream Out
outputs.description: Short pulse whenever Span selects a new channel.

outputs.name: Even Out
outputs.description: High when an even-numbered channel is active.

outputs.name: Odd Out
outputs.description: High when an odd-numbered channel is active.

behaviors.name: Pulse extraction from motion
behaviors.description: Any movement at Span can produce a new selected channel, a pulse stream, and parity gates. It turns continuous CV motion into repeatable rhythm information.

behaviors.name: Clock-locked channel changes
behaviors.description: When Trigger In is patched, output channel updates only on incoming edges. That keeps extracted rhythms aligned to an external tempo or clock divider.

behaviors.name: Channel index translation
behaviors.trigger: Span set fully CCW and attenuverter fully CW
behaviors.description: With the reference settings from the manual, GTE translates Channel Index signals from PoliMATHS or MultiWAVE into discrete gates for downstream modules.

behaviors.name: Odd/even split
behaviors.description: Odd and Even outputs report channel parity without needing to monitor the full eight-channel bank. It is a simple way to split a gesture into two related lanes.

behaviors.name: Flam delivery
behaviors.trigger: multiple source channels active at once
behaviors.description: When the source module presents multiple simultaneous channels, GTE turns them into a rapid run of triggers before settling on the final active channel.

patchIdeas.name: Gesture to drum gate bank
patchIdeas.patch: Slow CV source into Span · Space set tight · Channel Out bank to drum triggers · Pulse Stream Out to accent envelope · a moving control signal becomes a playable rhythm generator.
patchIdeas.diagram:
GTE:
* Span: 12:00
* Space: tight

CV Source:
Drum 1:
Drum 2:
Envelope:

- CV Source (Out) >> GTE (Span CV In)
- GTE (Channel Out 1-8) t> Drum 1 (Trig)
- GTE (Channel Out 1-8) t> Drum 2 (Trig)
- GTE (GTE Pulse Stream Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> Drum 1 (Accent)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked gesture synchronizer
patchIdeas.patch: External clock into Trigger In · pressure or joystick CV into Span · Space sets how quickly channels change · GTE only updates on clock edges, so the extracted pattern stays phase-locked.
patchIdeas.diagram:
GTE:
* Span: 12:00
* Space: medium

Clock:
CV Source:
VCA:

- Clock (Out) c> GTE (Trigger In)
- CV Source (Out) >> GTE (Span CV In)
- GTE (Even Out) g> VCA (CV)
- GTE (Odd Out) g> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: N.U.S.S. channel translator
patchIdeas.patch: PoliMATHS or MultiWAVE channel index into Span CV · Span attenuverter fully CW · Space fully open · GTE turns the source's channel activity into ordinary gates for drums, envelopes or switch logic.
patchIdeas.diagram:
GTE:
* Span: fully CCW reference
* Span Attenuverter: fully CW
* Space: fully open

Source:
Drum:
Envelope:

- Source (Channel Index Out) >> GTE (Span CV In)
- GTE (Channel Out 1-8) t> Drum (Trig)
- GTE (GTE Pulse Stream Out) t> Envelope (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Odd-even lane split
patchIdeas.patch: Gesture CV into Span · Odd Out to one voice and Even Out to another · pair the split with different envelopes to get alternating accents from one motion source.
patchIdeas.diagram:
GTE:
* Span: 1:00
* Space: medium

Voice A:
Voice B:
Envelope A:
Envelope B:

- Gesture (Out) >> GTE (Span CV In)
- GTE (Odd Out) g> Envelope A (Trig)
- GTE (Even Out) g> Envelope B (Trig)
- Envelope A (Out) >> Voice A (CV)
- Envelope B (Out) >> Voice B (CV)
